title: PS-69535: added missing layer panel filter removal button to converted drawing page
body: PS-69535: added missing layer panel filter removal button to converted drawing page
author: abarati

review_comments.body: Per Karl's comments in the Web Dev channel, we should no longer be using clickable divs (or other non-semantic elements for interaction), may want to convert this to a `button type="button"` or a modus button variant.
review_comments.author: henrykaus

review_comments.body: Can we instead call the LayerPanelService.resetAllFilters()?
review_comments.author: henrykaus

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,11 @@
+ @if (layerPanelService.hasActiveFilters()) { +
+ {{ removeFiltersLabel() }} +
+ }
